name: 24 Golf Club
about: 24 Golf Club is a 24-hour indoor golf simulator facility offering affordable monthly memberships. The venue allows members to book bays through its website or app, provides self-check-in, and enables golfing anytime, day or night, in any weather. The facility is equipped with advanced Uneekor simulators that provide a realistic and enjoyable experience designed to improve golf swings. The focus is on convenience and comfort for golfers looking to practice and play on their own schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for practice anytime, day or night
Advanced Uneekor simulators provide realistic experience and detailed swing data
Affordable monthly memberships with various options for individuals and families
Focus on improvement with accurate feedback technology

food_and_drink.notes: No information provided about on-site food services
No information provided about on-site alcohol services

simulator_hardware.notes: Uneekor excels in indoor golf solutions, offering precise launch monitors and simulators that provide detailed swing and ball data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether you need to bring your own clubs. It is recommended to bring your own equipment for the best practice experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on bringing outside food and drink. It is best to contact the venue directly for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. This information may vary depending on the number of players and booking details.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 24 Golf Club appears to be kid-friendly as it offers family memberships and focuses on providing a welcoming environment for golfers of all levels.
